skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Search the web for information, data, and references
skills.use_when: External data, market info, or reference material is needed

skills.name: Code Execution
skills.description: Execute code snippets for validation or computation
skills.use_when: Code needs to be tested, validated, or computation is required

skills.name: Memory Store
skills.description: Persist and retrieve intermediate results across pipeline steps
skills.use_when: Intermediate results need to survive across steps or agent boundaries

skills.name: API Call
skills.description: Make external API requests for structured data retrieval
skills.use_when: Structured data from external APIs is needed (financial data, weather, etc.)
